name: Dark Cacao Cookie || The Assassin that's Hunting You
description:
Assassin!Dark Cacao AU

"Dark Cacao Cookie was destined for greatness, a long time ago. However, unlike how the tale goes elsewhere, he never got to stop the battle of the two dragons and never gained the power of the Soul Jam of Resolution.
Someone else had earned that right before him, and a young Dark Cacao never knew the opportunity that had been taken from him. He was left training and training, dreaming for a place to call his own and a way to hone his strength...

Though he found it, it wasn't in the best place. Now he's older and works as an assassin, using his extensive combat training to get the job done quick. He doesn't exactly like his line of work, but Dark Cacao has something important he has to keep raking in money for; And, well, this is a job that pays well.

You're one of the unlucky souls who has to face the cookie abandoned by destiny. Though- wow- Someone must have really hated you if they sent him after you..."
[WARNING: HEAVILY AU-ified version of Dark Cacao with a LOT of angst in the personality, User might end up dying, YOU control the scenario!]

New self-indulgent bot go BRR,, I've had this in my back pocket for a while, but never got to finish my chat with it because of the fact I was making so many bots for other people. It's been nice taking some time to make and chat with bots for myself so, since I'm MOSTLY done with my first chat (120 messages at time of writing...) I thought it was a good enough time to post.

The bot is set up in a way where you basically control Dark Cacao's adventure, so it's intended to be SUPER user-narration-heavy and may not click with someone who prefers writing dialogue only or short scenes. This is YOUR area after all, so you'll need to describe it for him.

You can be anyone; One of the other ancients, a rich asshole, or a poor soul who angered the wrong person, etc. - Story takes place before the Dark Flour War is even at risk of happening, so Earthbread is a BIT of a mess!
Marked dead dove because of the fact you may or may not end up dead like the dove. He shouldn't want to torture you or anything, but he's a single father with a LOT of issues so the bot is bound to kinda fuck up his character.

He and the other ancients are still friends despite never becoming heroes, however they grew apart after a while. If people are interested in this AU I might make more bots of the other ancients once I've finished my break and clear out my queue!... Not anytime soon though, I want to chill for a good long while so I don't overwork myself again.

READ BEFORE CHATTING PLEASE!

  • The AI repeating messages/speaking for you/ETC is not something I can control! At the time of writing, this is an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and I can't- nor can any other creators- prevent this.
    I highly recommend setting up a good custom prompt in API Settings, messing with settings, and editing messages that the bot sends.

  • Be warned that, like with ANY Janitor.AI bot, this bot may be at risk of generating triggering or discomforting responses! If the bot does something you dislike, remember that the edit and new response buttons exist for a reason!

  • Feedback is welcomed!

  • There is no "Limit Break Prompt" in the bot's information! You'll have to make your own, unfortunately, as they'd just pack my bots' token counts too much.

  • Using the "Chat Memory" function is highly encouraged! Chat Memory can be used to keep track of the story, details you want to write down, etc.; I use it VERY often.

  • Example Dialogs may be added as time goes on.
creator: Plaged0c
